urdu transliteration text: Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Ghurbat Main Qatl Ho Gaya Mazloom Bay WatanMain Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan Behan Imam Hussain (AS) has been massacred heartlessly, away from homeI kept crying "O my brother, O my brother", while the corpse cried "O my sister, O my sister"

urdu transliteration text:
Teeron Pay Tha Rakha Hua, Lasha Hussain KaDooba Hua Lahoo Main, Tha Kurta Hussain KaThe corpse of Hussain lay on a bed of arrowsThe shirt of Hussain was drenched in his blood
Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Awaaz Thi Hussain Ki Behna Kafan KafanMain Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan BehanHussain cried out "Oh sister, my Kafan, my Kafan”I kept crying "O my brother, O my brother", while the corpse cried "O my sister, O my sister"

urdu transliteration text: Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Aayi Na Raas Dau Gardhi, Pardes Ki FizaKunba Shaheed Ho Gaya, Mera Ghar UjjardhgayaThe aura of Kerbala did not suit us even for a momentMy entire family was massacred and my house became empty

urdu transliteration text: Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Pardes Des Ghair Ka Apna Watan WatanMain Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan Behan This land is for outsiders, Madina is "our hometown, our hometown”I kept crying "O my brother, O my brother", while the corpse cried "O my sister, O my sister"

urdu transliteration text:
Ik Din Kay Dagh Mainay, Bahattar Utha LiyeKuch Dagh Mainay Kalb Kay, Andhar Chupa Liye In just one day, I witnessed 72 deaths I have hidden some of the sorrows deep inside my heart
Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Chuptay Nahin, Chupa Nay Say Dagh-e-Rasan RasanMain Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan Behan  However, no matter how much I try, I am unable to hide the marks of ropes on my bodyI kept crying "O my brother, O my brother", while the corpse cried "O my sister, O my sister"

urdu transliteration text: Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Dekha Hay Baba Mainay, Jo Manzar Bataoun KiyaNaizon Pay Tha Rakha Hua, Sar Har Shaheed KaO baba, how can I relay to you what all I have seen?The head of all martyrs were raised on spears

urdu transliteration text: Main Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha Behan
english translation text: Ghordon Kay Daud Nay Say Tha Tukray Badan BadanMain Bhai Bhai Kehti Thi Thi Lasha BehanThe bodies were trampled fiercely by running horsesI kept crying "O my brother, O my brother", while the corpse cried "O my sister”
